nasb.text: When he knocked at the door of the gate, a servant-girl named Rhoda came to answer.

esv.text: And when he knocked at the door of the gateway, a servant girl named Rhoda came to answer.

cnv.text: 彼得敲了大門，有一個名叫羅大的使女，出來應門。

ccb.text: 彼得在外面敲门，有一个叫罗大的婢女出来应门。

csbs.text: 彼得敲了外面的门，一个叫罗妲的女仆前来应门。
